title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Oil India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Oil India
jsonLd.description:
Oil India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Oil India:
Oil India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oil India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
